sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56138" key="katoyofagi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατοψοφᾰγ-ία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n56138.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ruinous gluttony</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">luxury</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:37" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.37</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
